name: klienta
description: Manage your own Google Ads account through AI chat via the Klienta MCP server. Includes an operating contract for safe, evidence-backed campaign/keyword/budget/ad changes (measure-before-acting, confirm-before-write, read-back verification) and a strictly read-only account audit playbook that produces a scored health report. Now also includes Meta Ads: read-only visibility (accounts, campaigns, ad sets, ads, insights with explicit attribution windows, creatives, delivery diagnosis), 5 undoable, guardrail-enforced write tools (status, budget, bid, rename, schedule — money in integer minor units, no dry-run on Meta), and the Faz 3 create chain: campaign → ad set → image ad (always created PAUSED, creative inline, undo deletes) plus v1 targeting updates (geo/age/gender/placements/Advantage+ audience), Page listing, and image upload.
